# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Datacenter Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: "Custom build script or command to run"
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: "Custom deployment command to run"
        required: false
        type: string
      working_directory:
        description: "Working directory for commands"
        required: false
        default: "."
        type: string

jobs:
  run-custom-commands:
    runs-on: [self-hosted, datacenter]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run build script
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.build_script }}

      - name: Run deployment command
        if: ${{ inputs.deploy_command != '' }}
        working-directory: ${{ inputs.working_directory }}
        run: |
          ${{ inputs.deploy_command }}
